adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: compatible-gateway-1

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave empty if the endpoint does not require one.

model.title: Model
model.description: The model name expected by your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Examples: gpt-4o-mini, ERNIE-4.0-8K (Baidu Qianfan), qwen-max, openai/gpt-4o

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Examples: https://your-endpoint.example.com/v1, https://qianfan.baidubce.com/v2

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies. Leave it empty to use the provider default.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.
